context: Current State: Allergy preference: low-shedding or lower-dander animals. Target adult dogs only. Breeds/size: Toy or Miniature Poodle (toy <10 lb; mini ~10–20 lb); Bichon Frise (~10–20 lb); Havanese (~7–13 lb). Location constraint: rescues/shelters within a 30-minute drive to allow multiple visits. Next steps: can help find local rescues/shelters within 30 minutes or prepare a short meet‑and‑greet checklist for visits.
